data.body: Epic cold-stall-chalk: B1 (#459) MERGED+closed. B2 (#479) + B4 (#480) pushed as a stack, plan-reviews PASS, local build green. scale-envelope.md import-only carve-out MERGED in #459. Guardrail 1 (import-only) enforced via contextvar sink at _seam.append_event + unit test. B4 ticket was left open (claim-before-work slip); coordinator retroactively claimed it. Stack watcher auto-submits+closes on votes.
